subject: WM-0177 ready for review
body: Closed Canvas P1 capacity-failure facts and P2 complete 80-label AST call/allocation audit; exact six focused files pass 52 tests, M1/M2/M3 100000-tick hashes remain exact, and final quality passes 79 files/482 tests; architect-authorized measurement evidence reuse remains byte-identical with no admission or benchmark rerun.
